name: Armor Smithbox
availability: Sold by Andre of Astora for 2000 souls. Sold by Vamos for 2000 souls. Sold by Giant Blacksmith for 2000 souls.
use: Allows to reinforce any piece of armor at a bonfire given they have the titanite and souls to do so.

name: Bottomless Box
availability: Sold by Undead Merchant for 1000 souls. Sold by Domhnall of Zena for 1000 souls.
use: Allows inventory management at a bonfire.
special note: Any items in the Bottomless Box may still be accessed by Kingseeker Frampt . Weapons and armor in the box cannot be accessed for reinforcement/ascension.

name: Lordvessel
availability: Given to the player by Gwynevere, Princess of Sunlight after defeating Dragonslayer Ornstein and Executioner Smough in Anor Londo .
use: Allows player to quick travel to specific bonfires throughout the world by warping at any bonfire.
special note: Progresses storyline once taken to Kingseeker Frampt or Darkstalker Kaathe . Player retains ability to warp after placing it underneath Firelink Shrine .

name: Repairbox
availability: Sold by Undead Merchant for 3000 souls. Sold by Andre of Astora for 2000 souls. Sold by Vamos for 2000 souls. Sold by Giant Blacksmith for 2000 souls.
use: Allows player to repair any equipment at a bonfire given they have the souls to do so.

name: Rite of Kindling
availability: Obtained after defeating Pinwheel in the The Catacombs .

name: Weapon Smithbox
availability: Sold by Andre of Astora for 2000 souls. Sold by Vamos for 2000 souls. Sold by Giant Blacksmith for 2000 souls.
use: Allows to reinforce any weapon at a bonfire given they have the titanite and souls to do so.
special note: Player still requires the use of a blacksmith to ascend weapons.
